title: NETTA Christmas Tree Fairy Lights - 50M 500 LED Mains Powered, Waterproof Outdoor String Light, 8 Modes Plug in Lighting Outside Indoor & Outdoor Garden Xmas Decorations - Cool White
features: CHRISTMAS FAIRY LIGHTS: Let your home shine brighter with this set of NETTA LED Cool White Christmas Fairy Lights that feature 500 beaming bulbs. These lustrous lights are sure to add a sparkle to your home or a glimmer to your garden over the festive season by enhancing the traditional Christmas theme. Not only are they perfect for Christmas, but they are ideal for any outdoor gathering or for serving a desirable decoration for weddings, birthday parties and events.

8 FUNCTIONS WITH MEMORY: This set of multifunctional string lights features 8 lighting modes to choose from, including Combination, Steady On, Slow Fade, In Waves, Slow Glow, Chasing/Flash, Sequential and Twinkle/Flash. The different lighting effects are controlled by a button on the plug adapter which make it easier than ever to achieve your desired lighting effects. The bulbs are set 10cm apart to ensure that you get a full festive glow over this Christmas period.

SAFE FOR INDOOR AND OUTDOOR USE: These lights are extra safe due to the low-voltage, mains-powered UK plug with a 31V low voltage adapter, which is IP44 rated, meaning that you can use this product both indoors and outdoors. A 5M lead wire ensures easy installation of these lights.

EASY TO USE: No batteries are required for this product making them super-easy to use. Just plug in and switch on to add a warm, festive glow to any room or area. They are safe to touch whilst they are on and have a 50M lit length to save you from struggling whilst creating your seasonal scene.

365-DAY WARRANTY: We hope that you love these lights, but on the off-chance that you don't, NETTA provides a full 365-day warranty on this product. If you are not completely satisfied with this item, please don't hesitate to contact our customer service department.
description: Product Description NETTA Fairy Lights - Cool White 50M Lit Length - 500 LED Bring the Christmas Spirit to your home this winter with our wide range of deluxe Christmas lights. Our NETTA Christmas Lights are designed to be the perfect indoor decorations, whilst also being durable for outdoor garden use. Perfectly suited for your parties, weddings, birthdays and more. These 500 LED lights will provide you with a fuller, brighter look wherever you place them. Key Features: 8 Lighting Modes With Memory Function 50M Lit Length, 5M Power Cable 500 LED Lights Low Power Consumption and Long Lasting LED Bulbs Dark Green Cable IP44 Waterproof, Indoor & Outdoor Use Low Voltage For Protection, Safe To Touch
